name: American Equity Investment Life Holding Company Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 6.625% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series B
summary: American Equity Investment Life Holding Company is a provider of retirement and insurance products, specializing in fixed index and fixed rate annuities. The company focuses on offering solutions to help clients protect their assets and generate income during retirement. American Equity is headquartered in West Des Moines, Iowa.
